commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers need to accept the compatibility impact and choose this clean PR as the canonical fix for the linked cluster.; Cleared: The diff tightens an existing route boundary and adds tests without new dependencies, workflow changes, package-resolution changes, permissions, or secret-handling changes. (sha=45e6698d553e29ea6db10e797f4ae460af3a6c8f)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes voice-call realtime WebSocket upgrade matching to exact-or-slash-child path boundaries and adds real `VoiceCallWebhookServer` routing regression tests.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +139. Total +150 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. By source inspection, current main and `v2026.6.6` use `pathname.startsWith(pattern)`, so `/voice/stream/realtime-extra/token` matches `/voice/stream/realtime`; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers need to accept the compatibility impact and choose this clean PR as the canonical fix for the linked cluster.

target.title: fix(voice-call): require realtime websocket path boundary
target.body:
Summary:
- Tightens realtime voice WebSocket upgrade routing so same-prefix sibling paths are not routed to the realtime handler.
- Previously, `/voice/stream/realtime-evil/token` matched `/voice/stream/realtime` because the matcher used raw `startsWith(pattern)` matching.
- The matcher now accepts only the exact configured path or a real slash-delimited child path under it.
- Preserves the existing root `realtime.streamPath="/"` behavior so root child paths such as `/token` still route to the realtime handler.
- Keeps the regression proof in `extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts`, exercising the real `VoiceCallWebhookServer` upgrade listener rather than a private matcher.

Validation:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts`
  - 42 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts`
  - 61 passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts`
  - passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts`
  - passed
- `git diff --check`
  - passed

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Realtime voice WebSocket upgrade routing accepted same-prefix sibling paths such as `/voice/stream/realtime-evil/token` for a configured realtime stream path of `/voice/stream/realtime`.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on macOS with Node, running the real `VoiceCallWebhookServer` on an ephemeral localhost TCP port through the webhook regression harness.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts`

Evidence after fix: Terminal output from the post-fix local run showed the webhook regression file passing against the real bound server path, including the realtime WebSocket upgrade routing cases:
```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts

extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts
  VoiceCallWebhookServer realtime WebSocket routing
    ✓ does not route sibling paths through the realtime stream handler
    ✓ routes root stream child paths through the realtime stream handler

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       42 passed (42)
```

Observed result after fix: `/voice/stream/realtime/token` reached the realtime handler and returned the test handler's 401 response. `/voice/stream/realtime-extra/token` did not increase the realtime handler call count. With `realtime.streamPath="/"`, `/token` still reached the realtime handler.

What was not tested: External telephony-provider infrastructure and remote reverse-proxy ingress were not exercised; this proof is limited to the local OpenClaw webhook server route boundary and WebSocket upgrade dispatch.
target.author: jason-allen-oneal

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
